title: Boost Remote Work with Otter.ai & Notion AI in 2023

reels.hook: Master productivity in 3 steps with Otter.ai!

Step 3: Share transcriptions with your team

reels.hook: Crunch the numbers: Is Otter.ai worth it?
reels.script: Otter.ai basic plan? $0. Paid plans cost, but save you time. Just how much? Reduce meeting admin by over two hours a week. See productivity gains in action.
onScreenText: Paid: Save over 2 hours per week
reels.caption: Don't just take our word for it, see the savings with Otter.ai! #ProductivityGains #AItools #OtterAI #EfficientMeetings

reels.hook: Free vs Paid: What's Best for You?
reels.script: Curious about Otter.ai's plans? Free gets you started with basic transcriptions. Paid lets you unlock more hours and enhanced features. Decide which plan suits your productivity needs.

reels.editingNotes: Use split-screen to show side-by-side comparison. Clear text for each plan.
